items.description:

Pro Tip: Is the Item too small? Too big? Bad Positioned?
Use Robloxs Accessory Adjustment mode!

items.description:

Ideal for both casual and formal occasions. Add a touch of elegance to your avatar's wardrobe with this timeless piece.
